title: polygala distans
intro: Polygala distans, also known as the small milkwort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala distans include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve respiratory function, and enhance immune system function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
